content:
1st International Workshop on Artificial Intelligence in Software Testing Co-located with ICST 2021
AIST will be virtual AIST will be held online. Details about the schedule and the platform will follow.
Important Dates  Submission deadline: 10 January 2021  Notification of Acceptance: 31 January 2021  Camera-ready: 20 February 2021   Paper Submission Papers are to be submitted via EasyChair in the following link:
https://easychair.org/conferences/?conf=aist21 See Call for Papers for more details.

title: AIST 2021
